query:
-- Check the order items for order 00121
SELECT oi.id, oi.orderId, oi.productId, oi.productName, oi.quantity, oi.unitPrice / 100.0 as unit_price_rupees, oi.lineTotal / 100.0 as line_total_rupees
FROM order_items oi
WHERE oi.orderId = 1230001;

-- Check if those productIds exist in products table
SELECT oi.productId, p.id as product_exists
FROM order_items oi
LEFT JOIN products p ON oi.productId = p.id
WHERE oi.orderId = 1230001;

FROM order_items oi

-- Check if those productIds exist in products table
